title: DLF is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: DLF is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
